title: Ender Cat Pack
description: Replaces the all_black cat variant with Ender cats!
body:
**Replaces the all_black cat variant with Ender cats!**

If you would like this texture to replace another cat variant:
1. Unzip the pack
2. Go inside the folder to ```\assets\minecraft\textures\entity\cat\```
3. Tename the png file.

![Ender Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eb9bf06e11074db46a36689c71376bd832d8547.webp)
